meta.title: Football AI v1.0 RC1 — Master Validation
meta.constraints: Validate / Audit / Report only — no code changes

executiveSummary: Build, unit tests, parser scripts, and most market-engine/knowledge subsystems pass. System validation FAILs on Patterns (3/10 patterns never match fixtures) and Consistency (Batch/Replay agree; Incremental diverges on patternStatistics bestLeague/worstLeague). Dual-stack architecture (live recommendation vs market-engine/knowledge) is not wired into production pipeline. Parent folder contains stale duplicate Next.js scaffold.

findings: Parent C:\Users\user\Desktop\football-ai\ contains stale Next 15 scaffold (package.json, src/app/) separate from canonical repo football-ai/football-ai/
components/ vs app/components/ — 5 admin/replay components at root components/, 2 at app/components/
database/ (1 file: bettingHistory.ts) vs lib/database/ (11 modules)
types/ (analysis.ts) vs per-module types scattered in lib/**
Duplicate project at parent: package.json (Next 15.3.3), src/app/page.tsx, src/app/layout.tsx — not referenced by canonical repo
types/analysis.ts — zero imports across codebase
database/bettingHistory.ts — isolated from lib/database/ stack
18 scripts/*.ts not wired in package.json (e.g. validate-special-parsers.ts, debug-parser.ts, test-backtest-engine.ts)
types/analysis.ts unreferenced
runMarketEngine used only by marketKnowledgeAccumulator + systemValidation — not by live recommendationEngine pipeline
MatchRecordVerifyResult duplicated in lib/database/supabaseMatchApi.ts and lib/database/compositeMatchStorage.ts
MarketAnalysis name used only in marketEngineTypes (no cross-file duplicate export found)
ReplayStep / MarketType / MatchStatus — semantic collisions across lib/replay/ vs marketKnowledge/replay/
No automated madge scan run; manual review of marketEngine → rules/patterns → marketEngineTypes shows acyclic layering
matchSchema.ts imports replay builder — upward coupling noted, not a runtime cycle
types/analysis.ts exports (HomeAwayStats, TeamStats, AsianHandicapMarket, etc.) — no consumers
createPlaceholderKnowledgeSnapshot exported but production path uses accumulator when verified
lib/knowledge/* interpret* functions — legacy knowledge layer parallel to marketEngine
SteamMoveRule, SharpMoneyRule — intentional placeholders, never trigger
marketHistoryProvider returns Not Implemented for all historical lookups
SteamMoveRule — placeholder, not implemented
SharpMoneyRule — placeholder, not implemented
marketHistoryProvider — Not Implemented
NOT_IMPLEMENTED_KNOWLEDGE_MESSAGE in marketKnowledgeTypes
createPlaceholderKnowledgeSnapshot in marketKnowledgeStore
TrapLineRule — partial placeholder metadata
scheduler buildSchedulerPlaceholderOdds for unmapped fixtures
0 TODO/FIXME comments in source (clean)

recommendation.notes: Feature fusion → recommendation engine → validation; well-layered but separate from marketEngine stack

validation.notes: lib/validation/, recommendationValidation — used by admin dashboard

replay.notes: Two namespaces: lib/replay/ (match UI replay) vs marketKnowledge/replay/ (statistics replay)

marketEngine.notes: Clean analyzer → rule → pattern layering; NOT connected to production recommendation pipeline

patternEngine.notes: Inside marketEngine/patterns/; 3 patterns never fire on validation fixtures

persistence.notes: File + InMemory repositories; checksum/manifest validated PASS

incremental.notes: Section PASS individually; Consistency vs Batch FAIL

findings: Dual-stack: live pipeline (parser → features → recommendationEngine) vs market stack (marketEngine → marketKnowledge) — no production bridge
Duplicate responsibility: lib/knowledge vs marketEngine analyzers
Naming inconsistency: MarketAnalysis (engine) vs analysis types in types/analysis.ts
Module merge candidates: marketKnowledgeStore vs persistence/ repository layer
Dependency direction violation: matchSchema → replay builder (domain schema depends on replay)

scripts.validate-special-parsers.ts: PASS — All parser validation checks passed
scripts.test-partial-markets.ts: PASS — Partial market handling tests passed

parserValidation.notes: lib/parser/parser.ts (897 lines) — primary parser; settlement via backtest engine scripts not in default npm test

scripts.test-production-validation.ts: PASS (with missing_market_outcomes warnings on 2 learning records)

fields.score: PASS — feature fusion + recommendation scores present

markets.AH: PASS — analyzer, rules, patterns, audit, score breakdown, risk level

firstDiff.rootCause: Incremental snapshot reconstruction from finalized stats loses leagueHitRates tie-break detail; best/worst league derived differently than batch path

additionalDiffs: HomeLowWaterFavorite.roi — float drift possible at scale (0.18142857142857147 vs 0.18142857142857144)

websiteValidation.localStorage: test-localstorage-persistence.ts available (not in default npm test)
websiteValidation.admin: 6 admin pages present in build output

duplicateComputation: Batch and incremental both re-run marketEngine per fixture — expected but expensive at scale
Feature collectors may re-fetch team profile slices per match in scheduler path
cacheOpportunities: Team profile API responses in dailyScheduler
Market engine snapshot per fixture hash during replay/incremental
Implied probability repair — batch cursor already exists
potentialON2: marketKnowledgeStatistics pattern/rule aggregation over growing observation lists
systemValidationRunner nested fixture × market × rule × pattern checks (validation-only)

blockers: Patterns: 3/10 patterns never match validation fixtures
Market engine stack not integrated into production recommendation path

issues.title: Batch/Replay vs Incremental checksum mismatch
issues.detail: patternStatistics bestLeague/worstLeague swapped for AwayHighWaterValue and HighOverroundRisk; incremental checksum 51db64c1… vs batch 1a4e03c3…

issues.title: Market Engine not wired to production recommendation pipeline
issues.detail: runMarketEngine only consumed by marketKnowledgeAccumulator and systemValidation; live recommendationEngine path bypasses market stack entirely

issues.title: Three patterns never match validation fixtures
issues.detail: HomeLowWaterBalanced, BalancedUnderdog, LowOverroundBalanced — pattern never matched across 12 fixtures

issues.title: Duplicate football-ai project at parent directory
issues.detail: C:\Users\user\Desktop\football-ai\package.json + src/app/ stale Next 15 scaffold alongside canonical football-ai/football-ai/

issues.title: Dual learning/knowledge stacks
issues.detail: lib/learning + recommendationLearning vs marketKnowledge + lib/knowledge — overlapping domains, unclear ownership

issues.title: Dual replay namespaces
issues.detail: lib/replay/ (UI match replay) vs marketKnowledge/replay/ (statistics) — naming collision on ReplayStep
